mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, type, area, price, deposit, start_date, end_date, available_date, description, images, loc_province, loc_city, loc_district, loc_address, loc_latitude, loc_longitude, status, reject_reason, view_count, favorite_count, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM houses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM houses WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT FROM houses WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM houses WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT FROM houses ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM houses WHERE status = 'pending'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM houses WHERE status = 'approved' AND create_time >= CURDATE() AND create_time < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO houses (user_id, title, type, area, price, deposit, start_date, end_date, available_date, description, images, loc_province, loc_city, loc_district, loc_address, loc_latitude, loc_longitude, status, reject_reason, view_count, favorite_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{type}, #{area}, #{price}, #{deposit}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{availableDate}, #{description}, #{images},
#{location.province}, #{location.city}, #{location.district}, #{location.address}, #{location.latitude}, #{location.longitude}, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,
#{status}, #{rejectReason}, #{viewCount}, #{favoriteCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE houses SET title = #{title}, type = #{type}, area = #{area}, price = #{price}, deposit = #{deposit}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, available_date = #{availableDate}, description = #{description}, images = #{images}, loc_province = #{location.province}NULL, loc_city = #{location.city}NULL, loc_district = #{location.district}NULL, loc_address = #{location.address}NULL, loc_latitude = #{location.latitude}NULL, loc_longitude = #{location.longitude}NULL, status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, view_count = #{viewCount}, favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
